body_transformation: The plump rounded body silhouette remains intact, now covered in dense, short bristly fur in burnt sienna with deep rust accents along the limbs. The leaf bulb on the back transforms into a thick, corded muscle mass with scar tissue patterns resembling cracked earth, its edges frayed like worn leather. The curled spiral tail tip gains knuckle pads with hardened skin, its surface textured with fine charcoal gray ridges. Pale cream underbelly shifts to a muted ochre hue, its surface smooth but marked with subtle calloused ridges matching the limb texture.
signature_feature: Back growth: corded muscle mass with cracked earth scar tissue patterns and bristly fur texture.
